visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman with short dark hair wearing a light blue ruffled dress waves enthusiastically at the camera in a modern room with large floor-to-ceiling windows. (2) The scene cuts to a wide shot of a spacious hotel room featuring a large bed with white linens, a wooden headboard, and a white freestanding bathtub positioned near the window overlooking a river. (3) A series of close-ups show bathroom amenities: two black bottles of Hunter brand body wash, a ghd brand hair dryer held by a woman lying on a bed, and a Marshall speaker on a wooden cabinet. (4) The woman in the blue dress is seen eating breakfast in a dining area, followed by her walking two small white dogs through a stylishly decorated lounge with a glass roof. (5) Finally, the woman and another female companion relax in modern hanging chairs and leather armchairs, looking out over the scenic river view at dusk.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 這是一間. (2) [Variety]: 讓我渴望. (3) [Subtitle]: 再去宜蘭的房間. (4) [Variety]: 廣闊的空間. (5) [Variety]: 高質感的家具與設備. (6) [Subtitle]: 在這裡我可以. (7) [Variety]: 待一整天. (8) [Subtitle]: 享受這一切. (9) [Subtitle]: 大落地窗. (10) [Subtitle]: 一面看河 一面看海. (11) [Variety]: 遼闊空間 舒適的木地板. (12) [Subtitle]: 躺在獨立浴缸泡澡. (13) [Variety]: 幸福到忘記時間. (14) [Subtitle]: 沐浴備品 用澳洲品牌hunter. (15) [Subtitle]: 吹風機 直上大風量ghd. (16) [Subtitle]: Marshall音響 還有智慧大電視. (17) [Subtitle]: 靠海夜晚會冷. (18) [Variety]: 就給你暖薑 泡澡用. (19) [Subtitle]: 早餐還有 專人親自料理. (20) [Variety]: 滿滿的愛心超美味. (21) [Subtitle]: 最重要是 能帶上毛孩子. (22) [Subtitle]: 因此這趟旅程 更加完美. (23) [Subtitle]: 環境乾淨舒服 還能包棟. (24) [Subtitle]: 快分享給心愛的他 一起創造 美好的旅程吧.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator in a blue dress, 1 female friend appearing in the later scenes.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with short black hair and bangs, wearing a light blue midi dress with ruffled details.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A luxury modern hotel room with high-end furniture, a minimalist aesthetic, and large windows offering a panoramic view of a wide river and distant coastline.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy acoustic guitar strumming begins with a bright pop sound. A male voice provides a cheerful, rapid-paced narration. (2) A sharp 'whoosh' transition sound occurs as the narrator mentions the spacious room. The BGM remains consistent with a steady 4/4 drum beat. (3) A light 'ding' sound effect highlights the mention of high-quality furniture. The narration maintain high arousal and positive valence. (4) Multiple 'pop' sound effects sync with the appearance of text overlays while the narrator lists the specific brands Hunter and ghd. (5) The audio concludes with a final enthusiastic call to action as the music swells slightly before a hard cut silence.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Feature Presentation -> Amenities -> Food/Pet-Friendly -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to promote a luxury, pet-friendly boutique hotel in Yilan, Taiwan, by highlighting its aesthetic interiors, high-end amenities, and scenic views to attract travelers looking for a relaxing and premium staycation.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct mention of specific brands (Hunter, ghd, Marshall) and highlighting their presence as a selling point of the accommodation.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses typical social media 'travel vlog' tropes including fast cuts, high-energy narration, and colorful text overlays to maintain viewer engagement.
